activities.observation: Farm dog observed on the road in front of MaMeeFarm during routine morning field observation.
Road conditions in front of MaMeeFarm observed during routine morning inspection. Traffic lane and roadside remained in normal condition at the time of observation.
Primary access road leading into MaMeeFarm observed during routine field inspection. Entrance remained accessible and unobstructed.
Dog food delivery received following online purchase. Package transferred into the farm during routine logistics activity.
Takeaway meal consisting of red pork with rice and stewed pork leg with rice observed. Purchase cost recorded as 65 THB.
